description: A business needs to make its semi-weekly federal payroll tax deposit.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total payroll tax liability (employee withholding + employer taxes) for the recent payroll.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately calculates the total amount to be deposited.

nodes.task_description: Log in to the Electronic Federal Tax Payment System (EFTPS).

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully accesses the EFTPS portal.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the tax deposit for the correct amount and date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules the payment to be made on time.
